headline: Jim Cramer Left Enthused By Lam Research Corporation (LRCX)’s Shares
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Insisted Recent AI Chip Selloff Wasn’t A Bottom & Discussed These 17 Stocks. Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the largest semiconductor manufacturing equipment providers in the world. Its shares are up by 233% over the […]

headline: These 5 Chip Stocks Are Riding the AI Fab Spending Wave
summary: Applied Materials just blew past its own growth forecast, and the companies supplying every HBM stack and gate-all-around node are collecting the checks. Five picks-and-shovels stocks sit directly under that spending fire hose, and the one most retail investors cannot name is leading the pack.
